reviews.school_name: Kaushalya World School - Pi I & II,PI
reviews.author: sandeep jadhav
reviews.review_body:
Really world class education,, with very High quality standards and awesome atmosphere,, school building a obviously very good and spacious,,
My Navsanjivani is enjoying this beautiful atmosphere daily,, special thanks to her class teacher Ratika Mam,, and thanks to whole Kaushalya World school staff,,

reviews.school_name: Kaushalya World School - Pi I & II,PI
reviews.author: sandeep jadhav
reviews.review_body:
This school has an international standard educational environment, My son Tanishq was going to another school before going to this school,Before putting him in this school I was under a lot of stress because his previous school experience was not very good for me,, But his class teacher in this school Anchal Gupta madam handal and taught him very well.But in this school his madam took care of him very lovingly and brought him out From the stress. and now he is really doing everything very beautifully . Whole credit goes to school staff and specially his mam Anchal Gupta,,
And I am really proud that my children are studying in this school.
Really world class school,with Very good atmosphere in all fronts,,,

reviews.school_name: Kaushalya World School - Pi I & II,PI
reviews.author: Ajit Yadav
reviews.review_body: Kaushalya world school's impressive infrastructure creates an ideal setting for learning, complemented by top-notch sports facilities. What truly elevates this institution is its exceptional educators who nurture students with expertise and dedication. It's an environment that encourages holistic growth, blending excellent resources with passionate teaching for a remarkable educational experience."

reviews.school_name: Kaushalya World School - Pi I & II,PI
reviews.author: Sandhya Dixit
reviews.review_body: The school excels in fostering a supportive and inclusive learning environment, where students feel encouraged to explore their full potential.

reviews.school_name: Kaushalya World School - Pi I & II,PI
reviews.author: Gurleen Kaur Nayyar
reviews.review_body:
One of the best schools in Greater Noida offering the best kind of infrastructure!
The faculty is very cooperative and understanding; thus providing a comprehensive learning environment for the students!
I would highly recommend it.
:)

reviews.school_name: Kaushalya World School - Pi I & II,PI
reviews.author: Meena Pal
reviews.review_body: Kaushalya world school is one of the best Schools in Greater Noida. They have the best infrastructure, cleanliness and child friendly environment and also contribute to overall development activities apart from regular studies. The curriculum is very well organised which integrates academics, faith and leadership quality in the students.

reviews.school_name: Kaushalya World School - Pi I & II,PI
reviews.author: Pooja Mavi
reviews.review_body:
Good evening everyone
My name is parish mavi.I read in Kg tulip class. My class teacher name is Anchal mam.
Teachers are the guiding lights who lead us on the path of knowledge and wisdom. Their dedication and hard work leave an indelible mark on our journey of Learning. Let's take a moment to appreciate and thank all our teachers for their unwavering support and dedication. Kaushalya world school is the best school in greater Noida and teachers . My teacher Anchal mam is very sweet and just like a mother to me.
Thank you 😊

reviews.review_body: Sibiling discount is very much attaractive. Teacher are very supportive. Overall good school
